about.title: About the Collector
about.subtitle: A lifetime passion for rare currency
about.intro: Abdullah Al Khathami is a distinguished collector and dealer of rare banknotes, coins, and medals based in Saudi Arabia. With a deep passion for numismatics and over a decade of experience, he has curated one of the finest private collections of Middle Eastern and world currency.
about.passionText: Every banknote tells a story — of nations, economies, artistry, and heritage. Abdullah's collection spans centuries of monetary history, from Ottoman-era notes to rare Saudi Arabian Monetary Agency issues.
about.expertiseText: All items in the collection are professionally authenticated and graded by leading numismatic grading services including PMG (Paper Money Guaranty) and NGC (Numismatic Guaranty Company), ensuring the highest standards of quality and authenticity.
about.commitmentText: With 100% positive feedback on eBay and hundreds of successful transactions, Abdullah has earned the trust of collectors worldwide. Every transaction is handled with care, professionalism, and dedication to collector satisfaction.

trust.title: Trust & Reputation
trust.subtitle: Verified seller with a proven track record
trust.gradingText: Every item in our collection is professionally graded by PMG or NGC — the world's leading third-party numismatic grading services. This guarantees authenticity, accurate condition assessment, and tamper-evident preservation.
trust.reason1Text: Every item is professionally authenticated and graded
trust.reason3Text: Safe, insured shipping to collectors worldwide
trust.reason4Text: Perfect feedback score across hundreds of transactions

adsLanding.heroSubtitle: Skip eBay fees. Buy directly from a trusted numismatic dealer with 100% positive feedback and get 10% off every item. PMG & NGC certified, shipped worldwide.

adsLanding.featuredSubtitle: Hand-selected pieces from our premium collection — all PMG or NGC graded
adsLanding.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to add rare banknotes to your collection
adsLanding.step1Desc: Explore our curated selection of rare, professionally graded banknotes from Saudi Arabia, the Ottoman Empire, and the Middle East.
adsLanding.step2Desc: Send us a message on WhatsApp with the item you want. Get an instant 10% discount off the eBay listing price. We accept PayPal, bank transfer, and more.
adsLanding.step3Desc: Your item is carefully packaged and shipped with tracking and insurance. Most US orders arrive within 7-14 business days.
adsLanding.faqSubtitle: Everything US collectors need to know about buying direct
adsLanding.faq1Q: How long does shipping to the US take?
adsLanding.faq1A: Most orders ship from Saudi Arabia via registered airmail or express courier. Typical delivery to the US is 7-14 business days. Tracking is included with every order, and insurance is available for high-value items.
adsLanding.faq2Q: What payment methods do you accept?
adsLanding.faq2A: We accept PayPal (Goods & Services for buyer protection), bank/wire transfer, and Zelle. All payments are processed securely before shipping.
adsLanding.faq3Q: Are the banknotes authentic and professionally graded?
adsLanding.faq3A: Absolutely. Every item we sell is professionally authenticated and graded by PMG (Paper Money Guaranty) or NGC (Numismatic Guaranty Company). Each comes in a tamper-evident holder with a certification number you can verify online.
adsLanding.faq4Q: Why is it cheaper to buy direct vs eBay?
adsLanding.faq4A: eBay charges sellers significant fees (up to 15%). By buying directly through WhatsApp, we pass those savings to you as a 10% discount. Same item, same seller, same quality — just a better price.
adsLanding.faq5Q: What if I'm not satisfied with my purchase?
adsLanding.faq5A: Your satisfaction is our priority. If an item is not as described, we offer a full refund. We have maintained 100% positive feedback on eBay across 216+ transactions because we stand behind every sale.
adsLanding.ctaSubtitle: Message us on WhatsApp to get 10% off any item, or browse our full collection on eBay with buyer protection.
adsLanding.ctaDisclaimer: Prices are in USD. Discount applies to direct purchases via WhatsApp only.
